use_cases: Interactive portfolio showcasing with 3D rotating image spheres
Product galleries with smooth drag-to-rotate navigation
Team member displays in immersive 3D layouts
Visual storytelling with modal image detail views
ai_summary: An interactive 3D image sphere component that arranges images using Fibonacci distribution for even coverage. Features drag-to-rotate with momentum physics, auto-rotation, dynamic scaling based on depth position, and modal image viewing. Optimized with z-indexing and visibility culling for smooth performance on both desktop and mobile devices.
